name: vitest
tagline: Reference index for the Vitest testing framework covering config, test/describe/expect APIs, mocking, coverage, snapshots, and advanced.
verdict: Clean, versioned, low-risk reference skill: compact index with all bulk material split into 16 on-demand reference files, a dated versioning note, and a clear trigger description. It performs no actions and touches no network, files, or credentials. Sole gap is no stated exclusions, which matters since it broadly covers a whole framework and could overlap.

highlights.summary: No exclusion text anywhere despite covering a whole framework's surface (could overlap with Jest or project-specific test skills).
